title: Grows to Towering Heights
summary: For brief periods, you can grow larger and, with enough experience, to towering heights.
tiers: Tier 6: Divide Your Mind or Infer Thoughts
gm_intrusions: Part of the disguise slips. An NPC thinks the disguised character is someone they know very well.
text: For brief periods, you can grow larger and, with enough experience, to towering heights. HAS A THOUSAND FACES You can change your appearance to look like anyone else.
details: For brief periods, you can grow larger and, with enough experience, to towering heights.
You can change your appearance to look like anyone else.
